_comments: Marks the ViewType.Icon field as ExtendedType='Icon' so the generated admin form
renders the MJ icon picker (the stored values are already Font Awesome classes).
Done via metadata (source of truth) rather than a migration. The v5.39 Icon-backfill
ran before the v5.40 migration created the ViewType table, so this field was missed.
Icon — Font Awesome class shown in the view-type switcher; icon-picker in the admin form
